title: Cobblemon x Still Life Compatibility
description: A simple datapack or Mod that makes cobblemon compatible with Still Life
body:
A simple datapack or Mod that makes Cobblemon compatible with Still Life,it adds all of the biome tags needed by the Cobblemon mod to spawn all of the Mons!


Compatible with any Cobblemon add on that adds Mons,as long as it uses vanilla and/or Cobblemon Biome Tags


Tutorial:



Datapack Version: put the Zip file in /minecraft/saves/worldname/datapacks/



Mod Version: put the jar file in /minecraft/mods/
